name: SuperSaver Card
whyText: High grocery spend and good CIBIL score increase approval odds. SHAP: income (+), utilization (-), on-time payments (+).

name: Travel Max
whyText: Frequent travel pattern; SHAP shows spend categories drive reward fit; approval medium due to thin file length.

name: Cashback Go
whyText: Entry-friendly card; SHAP indicates low risk and broad merchant fit; best for building history.
